ValidationRule.description: Liquidation Type is required when Stage is Approval or Closed Liquidation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Approval"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Closed Liquidation") ), ISBLANK(TEXT(Liquidation_Type__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Liquidation Type is required when Stage is Approval or Closed Liquidation
